name: Say the line _Jak!
description:
Not really a roleplay bot.

Best to use a proxy probably.

Can and will make cringe responses if you're not careful enough.

If he's not talking about the character you have in mind then you better mention the source material of your character.

Becareful with what you say, this guy literally just talked in ransomware or some shit in testing.

WJSJhhhsdjxjd

Say the line Wojak!

"What line, what are you talking about, my name is not Wojak. Let me go from your basement."

Haha I love this little fella!

Talk to this little fella! He is vey funny
creator: vergil definetly
